title: Populate Quality History & Gap Registry with Sample Data
description: Create realistic sample data for gold_quality_history and gold_gap_registry tables to demonstrate their value before organic data accumulates.

reasoning.why: Quality History and Gap Registry tables provide value through showing TRENDS OVER TIME. Without historical data, we cannot demonstrate their core purpose.
businessValue: Can't demo 'coverage improved from 85% to 100%' without history
Can't show 'this gap has been open for 3 months' without first_seen tracking
Sample data enables building reports/dashboards before waiting weeks for real data
Proves the concept works and validates the schema design
Portfolio showcase: demonstrates proactive quality monitoring
reasoning.alternative: Wait for organic data to accumulate over multiple pipeline runs (takes weeks/months)
reasoning.tradeoff: Sample data is fake but enables immediate demonstration; will be supplemented by real data over time

acceptanceCriteria: gold_quality_history has 20+ rows showing metrics across 5+ simulated pipeline runs
gold_gap_registry has 10+ rows showing gap lifecycle (new, persisting, resolved)
Data tells a coherent story (e.g., coverage improving, gaps being resolved)
Sample data clearly marked as synthetic (optional: flag column)
Can build a trend chart showing quality improvement over time
dependencies: Semantic model updated with quality tables (from Task 019)

subtasks.title: Design sample data scenarios
subtasks.details: Define 5 simulated pipeline runs with realistic metric progression

subtasks.title: Create SQL/PySpark script to insert sample quality_history rows
subtasks.details: 25 rows: 5 metrics x 5 runs spanning Jan 1-18, showing coverage 85%->99%

subtasks.title: Create SQL/PySpark script to insert sample gap_registry rows
subtasks.details: 12 gaps: 7 resolved + 5 open, with lifecycle from Jan 1-18

subtasks.title: Validate sample data renders correctly in reports
subtasks.details: Ran notebook, built trend chart on Data Quality page

gapRegistry: Gap 'Uknown Material X': first_seen=Jan 8, status=Open, occurrences=47

notes: DEPENDENCIES: Task 018 (creates tables) and Task 019 (adds to semantic model)
Task 019 required so sample data can be visualized in Power BI dashboards
This task exists because quality infrastructure without demo data is hard to validate
Real data will supplement/replace sample data as pipeline runs accumulate
Sample data should be realistic but not attempt to match actual procurement values
CLAUDE: Write PySpark/SQL script with backdated sample data inserts
ERIK: Run script in Fabric, verify data appears in Power BI, build trend chart
